SUBJECT: The secret - ALMOST revealed

convertlinks

>>> This is a long email. But it's important stuff, 
and I needed to take the time to explain it to you. 
Please take the time to read it completely - it's 
important to your business. <<<

OK, let's all take a deep breath... the rumors have 
been spreading like a wildfire, and it's time to calm 
things down before this gets COMPLETELY out of 
hand...

Over the last few weeks we have released three 
"Going Natural 2.0" videos. From everything I've 
heard, people loved them... they loved the killer 
content and they loved the production values.

(OK, I will admit... yes, I am a bit proud of my 
video production skills. I mean, I've got some 
chops - I don't know many other Internet 
Marketers who have won National Emmys or 
who were principals in the Blair Witch Project. 
Yes, the videos rocked... yes, I'm proud of them.)

In any case, after we released those videos the 
rumors started up... people were saying we were 
about to re-open StomperNet. Every time I denied 
the rumor, it just seemed to fan the flames.

And then we released our Stomper Scrutinizer 
software. And instead of charging something 
like $300 a month product, we released it for free.

(If you haven't gotten your copy yet, go get it here.

Now that REALLY shook people up. People were 
wondering "just what are these guys up to?"

In fact, you might have been one of those folks who 
were wondering what was going on.

And, of course, the rumors started up again... people 
were saying that StomperNet was about to re-open.

Well... let me clear this up right now.

We are NOT about to re-open StomperNet. Maybe in 
a few months, but not now. So if you were hoping to 
get into Stomper... well, it ain't going to happen 
anytime soon. Sorry about that.

HOWEVER... we do have something coming - and it's 
coming very soon.

I don't want to be all secretive about this, but we're 
going to be releasing another Going Natural 2.0 video 
on Monday. This will be the best and most 
content-packed video yet. The script is in its final 
stages right now, and we'll be shooting and editing the 
video over the weekend...

And I think you're going to be shocked at some of 
the stuff we have in the video. If you thought the first 
three Going Natural 2.0 videos had great content... 
well this one is going to seriously raise the bar.

But this isn't just about "content"... it's about a 
fundamental shift in what's happening online. The 
buzzword on everyone's lips these days is "Web 2.0".

And sometimes when you keep hearing a buzzword, 
you think it's just hype.

Well, there is a huge amount of hype around Social 
Media and Web 2.0... but don't get distracted by the 
hype - there's also a fundamental change taking place 
deep in the underbelly of Internet Marketing.

Make no mistake... search has changed. And 
conversion has changed. Big time.

For well more than six months, we've had our 
Stomper faculty studying this stuff feverishly. The 
amount of hours and resources that we have poured 
into this is simply crazy... but with such a fundamental 
shift happening online, there was simply 
no other way.

And the strategies and tactics that we uncovered 
(and then started using) are are working crazy-good.

Do you want instant search engine rankings?

Check. Within hours, in fact.

More natural high-converting traffic?

Check. Monster traffic.

How about multiple Google rankings?

Check. I wouldn't believe it if I didn't see it.

How about a higher conversion rate?

Check. The phrase "Holy Grail" keeps running through 
my head.

I could go on and on - but that's what we are going to 
show you in our next video, so I don't want to spill all 
the beans...

Like I said, the video is going to shake people up. And 
it's not going to just be a bunch of "what to do"... we're 
going to show you HOW we do it.

But let's get back to those rumors...

This is the bottom line... we are going to be releasing 
a Coaching Program very soon.

As you probably know, we've never done anything like 
this. Our business has been running a very high-end 
training portal for Internet Marketers: StomperNet.

And frankly, the price for StomperNet has meant some 
people just couldn't afford it. That doesn't make me 
happy, but when we decided to go with the best faculty 
that my dollars could buy, it meant we had to price it 
at the higher end of the spectrum.

But this change we are seeing right now is so big and 
the opportunities are so huge, that we decided that we 
had to do something different.

So we went back to the drawing board - and we 
decided that if StomperNet was sorta like going to 
Graduate School to get a real-world MBA, then we 
needed something more focused (and lower-priced) 
that would be like taking a single very focused high-level 
university course.

"Stomper University" if you will. I like the sound of 
that.  :-)

And THAT is what we're going to be releasing very 
soon... like next week.

Of course, like any class, this Coaching Program is 
going to have to be limited in size. That's the only way 
we can insure that we maintain our Stomper quality.

And since this is the first time anyone is going to get 
a peak behind the curtain at a super-focused Stomper 
Coaching Program (especially without the normal 
Stomper sticker price), I imagine the demand will be 
pretty intense.

But we'll have more time to talk about that later... I'm 
working on contingency plans and I'm hoping we can 
meet the demand.

In the meantime, watch for our next Going Natual 2.0 
video that we are releasing on Monday. This isn't 
some "prelaunch hype" video. You have already seen 
in our last three videos that we are all about delivering 
serious, meaty content. This video is going to be the 
best yet.

That's it for now... if you have any questions or 
comments (or if you just want to watch everyone else's 
reaction), then go to our blog now and join the conversation.

best regards,
Andy

P.S. If you want to see ALL the Going Natural 2.0 videos 
in one place, we set up an "uber video page" for you.

P.P.S I'm going to be personally watching the comments 
on our blog, so if you have a comment or question for me,
that's the best place to get my attention.
